ques: Browse destinations on the Google Flights homepage from Seattle, look at destinations on a map, and recommend some famous places to travel that are within a reasonable distance and price.
answer: From Seattle, the best famous, close, and affordable trips are Los Angeles (€113, nonstop ~3h), Las Vegas (€113, nonstop ~2h42m), San Diego (€147, nonstop ~2h53m), Portland (€156, nonstop 59m), Denver (€158, nonstop ~2h52m), and San Francisco (€185, nonstop ~2h17m) — all West Coast/Western US picks under ~€200 round trip; New York is reachable nonstop too but pricier (€263, ~5h26m).
